body_excerpt: In smmu_attach_dev of arm-smmu-v3.c, there is a possible way to sign malicious Android Runtime bootclass artifacts due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
